view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step requires validation of agent-specific rate limits, but the evidence does not provide any information or results related to this specific scenario. The expected outcome of confirming the scenario behavior or producing a failure report is not supported by the existing evidence, which primarily focuses on booking processes without addressing rate limits. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no direct evidence to assess the outcome of the scenario.
